description: Vulnerability allowlist for EnterpriseHub pip-audit gate. Each entry is reviewed and classified. CI fails if pip-audit reports an ID not in this list.

vulnerabilities.reason: needs-investigation: OSV MAL- alert (malicious package indicator) with no fix_version listed; fastapi 0.136.3 is the official PyPI release of a widely-used framework, so this is most likely an OSV false positive or namespace collision. Allowing temporarily; track as follow-up to verify against OSV record and bump fastapi if a legitimate fixed version surfaces.

breaking-bump-deferred: fix requires major version bump (0.x to 2.14+ minimum). MCP protocol changed between 0.x and 2.x; bumping touches mcp_server.py + 7 domain MCP servers + AgentForge tools. Tracked as separate migration spec.
breaking-bump-deferred: same fastmcp 0.x to 2.x major bump constraint as CVE-2025-62800.
breaking-bump-deferred: same fastmcp 0.x to 2.x major bump constraint.
breaking-bump-deferred: same fastmcp 0.x to 2.x major bump constraint.
breaking-bump-deferred: fix requires bump to fastmcp 3.x (latest is 3.3.1). Same major-version constraint.
breaking-bump-deferred: fix requires bump to fastmcp 3.x. Same major-version constraint.
